title: Trims Resources
description: Separate project to simplify downloading Trims Overhaul's resource pack
body:
Separate download for Trims Overhaul's resources - "Ease of Access"  


This is the exact same as the contents bundled in the file for the Trims Overhaul datapack and mod.

---

Used for:
 - Armor models that use custom materials (Blaze Powder, Wind Charge, Nether Star, etc)
 - Death messages for a few specific abilities, like Tidal Burst, or occasional, like Harpoon.
 - Full translations for a dozen different languages
 - Improving the accuracy of spaces on some menus, mainly the admin Toggles Menu.
 - Also has a built-in fix for vanilla armor z-fighting on trims (Also has a separate project)
   - Also renames "Left Button" and "Right Button" to "Left Click" and "Right Click" (English-only)
